description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed for outdoor activity, featuring a wide-brimmed sun hat that provides ample shade to the face and neck. The individual wears a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, both of which appear loose-fitting and comfortable for warm weather. Tall boots cover the lower legs, suggesting readiness for walking on uneven or potentially muddy terrain. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and the overall build is average, with no visible accessories or carried items. The face is obscured by the hat, and the neck is protected by a scarf or cloth drape. The attire and accessories suggest a person prepared for sun exposure, possibly for gardening, hiking, or outdoor work.
description: An adult figure in a sun hat, short-sleeved shirt, shorts, and tall boots, dressed for outdoor activity with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the sun hat, shirt, shorts, and boots, with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the wide-brimmed hat, shirt, shorts, and boots.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the front of the hat, shirt, shorts, and boots, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the hat, shirt, shorts, and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: wide-brimmed sun hat, short-sleeved shirt, knee-length shorts, tall boots, neck drape
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
